summary: The diff implements backend filtering with all 7 criteria (REQ-61), smart ordering by area name (REQ-62), and frontend integration (REQ-63). However, the diff summary is truncated, limiting verification of complete implementation details. All main requirements appear addressed based on visible evidence.

hallucinated_features.description: Migration module added to handle schema changes for isVerified and transmissionType fields
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest explicitly states 'Do NOT add rejection logs or new database tables' and 'Do NOT modify existing trip statuses'. While migration.mo doesn't add new tables, it implements schema migration logic that was not requested in any requirement.
